title: Pseudopodospermum molle
taxonomy: Pseudopodospermum molle is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It belongs to the genus Pseudopodospermum. The family Celastraceae is part of the order Celastrales. The order Celastrales is a part of the clade Rosids, which is a division of flowering plants. It is also sometimes classified as part of the clade core eudicots, which is a larger group of flowering plants.
